data.title: Add support for file/image uploads
data.description:
**Labels:** `enhancement`, `frontend`, `backend`

**Description:**
Enable users to upload files and images for multi-modal chat (vision models).

**Proposed Solution:**
Add file upload capability with support for images and documents.

**Features:**

* Image upload and preview
* Document upload (PDF, TXT)
* Image analysis with vision models
* File size limits and validation
* Drag-and-drop interface

**Acceptance Criteria:**

- [ ] Users can upload images
- [ ] Images preview before sending
- [ ] Vision models can analyze images
- [ ] File size/type validation
- [ ] Progress indicator for uploads
- [ ] Support for multiple files

**Technical Considerations:**

* Add file input and drag-drop zone
* Store files in R2 or convert to base64
* Update API to accept multipart/form-data
* Add vision model support (GPT-4V, Claude Vision)
* Validate file types and sizes
* Handle large files efficiently

**Effort & Value Ranking:**

* ⏱️ Time: **Medium-High** (upload handling, storage, vision model integration, validation)
* 🧩 Complexity: **High** (file handling, storage strategy, multiple format support, vision API integration)
* 💎 Value: **High** (unlocks new use cases, multimodal capabilities highly valued)
